_comment_security: SEC-060: API rewrite changed from http://194.195.209.138 to https://api.arcs-hive.example. Vercel-edge to VPS plain HTTP leaks JWTs and signed messages on the wire. Set API_BACKEND_URL_HTTPS at deploy time and put the VPS behind a Cloudflare/Caddy TLS terminator (or a Cloudflared tunnel) before re-enabling.

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https: blob:; connect-src 'self' https://rpc.testnet.arc.network wss: wss://*.walletconnect.com https://*.walletconnect.com; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'self'; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'
